package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_handler_stores_context_in_struct_field: Code that saves `*gin.Context` onto long-lived structs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule051NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule051NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule051NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario051Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule051NegativeService, input Rule051NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
